title: lagochilus gypsaceus var. linearilobus
intro: Lagochilus gypsaceus var. linearilobus is a plant species known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine and Tibetan medicine. It is defined as a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, with linear or lance-shaped leaves and a branching habit. The plant is believed to have adaptogenic properties, helping the body to adapt to stress and promoting balance in various physiological processes, and is also used to treat conditions such as hypertension, fever, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lagochilus gypsaceus var. linearilobus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health problems.
